highlights.text: We saw this for over a week and on Monday at 4pm (when we were 5734) I wrote to readers: “Bull case tomorrow: No change.
Prior to breakout, ES will typically put in multiple failed breakdowns of support, which is the footprint of institutional accumulation.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll talk about the setup that initially triggered todays long back on Monday at 630pm (a classic Failed Breakdown), followed by an additional setup yesterday morning at 5795 that triggered the breakout squeeze (a Level Reclaim, the advanced sibling setup of the Failed Breakdown).

post_title: SPX Has Made It *22nd* New All Time In 2024, Will It Stick Though? Oct 11 Plan
